title: Workflows are amazing!
excerpt:

posts.author: DavidSchenkler (David Schenkler | monday ambassador cohort 7)
posts.cookedHtml:
God bless workflows!!!

They aren’t 100% perfect yet, but I’m sure many of the below feature requests for workflows will be coming soon down the pipeline. Although some of my workflows span over 250 blocks, it still saves me more time than learning how to use Make or Zapier. Some of the things that have been really bothering me are fixed in workflows, so kudos to creating workflows!!!

Some rooms for improvement:

  • Copy/Paste Blocks
  • monday doc automations
  • integrations with other platforms
  • easier duplication
  • easy fix across huge workflows.

Anyway, keep at it!

posts.author: DavidSchenkler (David Schenkler | monday ambassador cohort 7)
posts.cookedHtml:
It would be great if we can:

  • Add files from item source to this.
  • Connect boards without need to connect to specific items. Make it item id or column related.

posts.author: DavidSchenkler (David Schenkler | monday ambassador cohort 7)
posts.cookedHtml: All of these recommendations have been fixed!
